元々はここに「ため量」の（タメ技を使用する為のため）
を0にする変数を配置していたが、ダメを受けてもタメが持続
するように・・・ということで削除している
ここでキャラドット画像を表示しておくべきなのか否か。
見え方次第で配置しておくかを決める。
"Oh? Are you done with your practice swings already?"
I still want to practice my swordsmanship.
Ask for explanations about attack methods, etc.
The test slash is over, and the next explanation—the
"Are you going to stop now? I think it's safe to attack with
this, but be careful with dangerous enemies, okay?"
"Well, as long as you keep that dangerous enemy in the corner of your
mind, you'll be able to tell just by looking at them, so it's fine."
"So, for the next explanation... We'll use images to explain."
"You see a gauge in the upper left corner of the screen, right? The top
gauge represents your HP, which indicates your physical strength, and
the gauge below it represents the remaining power to use skills."
"Please proceed with caution while keeping an eye on this gauge."
"There are various ways to recover health, but if you're in a
pinch during battles, you can easily restore your HP without
opening the menu by using shortcut keys!"
"The corresponding button is 'D' on the keyboard, but be careful not to
underestimate it because it requires SP to use."
"This is how the easy battle works. Next is the regular
battle (command battle), but this one is also quite simple,
""Both '戦う' and 'オート' mean 'fight' but they are both written
"First, if you choose "Auto," it will act on its own. The AI
will make decisions on its own, so it's not guaranteed to be
the best choice, but it can be convenient."
"The options that appear after selecting "Battle". They are
""『Attack』 is an action where you directly attack the enemy
and deal damage, while『Defense』is an action where you
protect yourself and reduce the damage taken.""
""『Skills』refer to using techniques that one has learned.
It's like the main action, I suppose.""
"You can understand the content of the skill to some extent
by hovering the cursor over the technique item."
"Items' are used to use the items you possess. There are also ones that
can restore HP and SP or inflict damage on enemies, so it's good to
try using them without hesitation, don't you think?"
"By the way... about the "Escape" command, unfortunately you
can't choose it, so be careful, okay? Actually, there's no
point in running away from the boss, so..."
"Oh, that's right. If you lose, there will be a naughty event, but
don't forget that ultimately you need to defeat it, okay?"
"By the way, even if you defeat them without triggering any
lewd events, the events will still be collected and can be
viewed in the reminiscence room, so please rest assured."
"Oh yeah, that's right. In the settings――Basically, you can
change the boss difficulty in the options menu, and it also
affects achievements, but there's no need to worry."
説明書：バトルコーナー前
"Once you defeat the boss, you can have a rematch with the
boss as many times as you want at your home."
"You can rest assured because if you change the difficulty level at
that time and win, you will be able to unlock achievements."
"Also, in battles here, you can get rewards after defeating
enemies - like experience points and money. So it might be a
"Hmm, let's see. This is a basic explanation, I guess. You
should be able to learn more by using the item manual."
"I guess my role is over now. Well then, I'll take my leave."

I still want to practice my swordsmanship.
I will continue to practice my swordsmanship without change.
"You're still doing it... Well, that's your freedom, so feel
free to do as you like."
"Once you're satisfied, please talk to me again."
Ask for explanations about attack methods, etc.
I will explain how to attack.
"The method is simple, just get close to the enemy and press
the confirm key. That alone can deal damage."
"The attack itself...it would be fine if you just pressed the
confirm button, like a practice swing."
"Another way is simply to collide. You will also take damage,
but this method is also available."
"After that, there's the charge attack. This one is activated
by holding down the attack button, the confirmation key, for
a moment and then releasing it."
"Right? It's easy, isn't it? The explanation ends here, so
feel free to try it out."
